name: Cheesy Squash Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the squash and onions in butter for about 15 minutes or until tender. Remove from heat.
2. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper if desired.
3. Combine the egg, sour cream, and half of the crumbled bacon in a bowl.
4. Add the squash mixture, mixing well.
5. Spoon half of the squash mixture into a buttered 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
6. Sprinkle half of the cheese over the top. Spoon the remaining squash mixture on top of the cheese.
7. Top with the remaining cheese and rest of the bacon.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until bubbly.
